summary: A ride-sharing/trip management app with driver dashboard, customer booking, and admin flows. Currently implementing micro patch to lock driver availability toggle when driver has an accepted trip.
architectural_notes: Driver availability is locked (forced Available) whenever driver has any accepted trip; toggle re-enables and restores last saved value when trip is completed
Backend must guard against setting driver Unavailable while an accepted trip exists, returning a clear error

existing_features.title: On the Driver Dashboard frontend, derive a boolean `hasAcceptedTrip` by checking whether the driver's 'My Accepted Trips' list contains any trip with status `accepted`. When `hasAcceptedTrip` is true: (a) force the displayed availability to Available/true regardless of the stored value, (b) render the availability toggle in a disabled/greyed-out state so the driver cannot interact with it, and (c) display helper text directly beneath the toggle reading: 'Availability is locked while you have an accepted trip.'

When the driver clicks 'Mark as Completed' and the trip transitions out of `accepted` status (i.e., the accepted trips list becomes empty or no accepted trips remain), re-enable the availability toggle and restore it to the driver's last persisted availability value from their profile.

Add a post-build checklist comment block (as a visible UI element or inline code comment) confirming the two verification steps: (1) Accept trip → toggle is disabled and availability shows Available; (2) Complete trip → toggle is re-enabled.

new_feature_requests.summary: Lock driver availability toggle when trip status is 'accepted' (driver dashboard only): force Available, disable toggle, show helper text, block backend updates, restore on completion

In the backend, add a guard to the `updateAvailability` (or equivalent) function: if the calling driver has any trip with status `accepted`, reject any attempt to set availability to `false` (Unavailable) and return a descriptive error message such as 'Cannot set Unavailable while you have an accepted trip.'
